title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.520 - Regional investment districts deemed special districts
text:
70.520.  Regional investment districts deemed special districts. — The regional investment district created under section 70.515 shall be considered to be a special district under the provisions of sections 115.001 to 115.641*.
(L. 2006 S.B. 825) 
*Section 115.001 was repealed by both S.B. 592 and S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision, 2018.
